## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint:fix` passes
- [ ] Local build (`npm run build`) completes without errors
- [ ] Responsive design verified (especially for **Live Mode** 🎸)
- [ ] i18n strings added/updated
- [ ] Documentation or comments updated (if logic changed)
- [ ] No sensitive information (API keys, secrets) included
